def negative_pandas_eval_string_manipulation():
    rule_id = "pandas_eval_string_manipulation"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "warning"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Dynamic string building is fed into pandas eval/query calls, increasing injection and correctness risk."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
